responsibility: Fake-green detection, dirty work detection, duplicate detection, failure/heresy checks, semantic cleanliness, readability/explainability audits, Speculum-style hard gates.
servitor_ask: What fake-green risks exist in this task?
What dirty-work or duplicate risks must be blocked?
What hard Speculum-style audit gate can stop PASS?
warn_block_profile: WARN on partial audit coverage with explicit NOT_RUN boundary
BLOCK on PASS claim without evidence
BLOCK on dirty/duplicate drift left unresolved
BLOCK on unreadable or semantically contradictory closure
required_actions: Check for dirty work and duplicate drift
Enforce readability and explainability of closure artifacts
Apply hard Speculum-style audit gate before PASS
forbidden_actions: Ignore semantic contradiction in owner-facing output
